2604.07877.title: MemReader: From Passive to Active Extraction for Long-Term Agent Memory
2604.07877.paper_summary: Long-term memory is fundamental for personalized and autonomous agents, yet populating it remains a bottleneck. Existing systems treat memory extraction as a one-shot, passive transcription from context to structured entries, which struggles with noisy dialogue, missing references, and cross-turn dependencies, leading to memory pollution, low-value writes, and inconsistency. In this paper, we introduce the MemReader family for active long-term memory extraction in agent systems: MemReader-0.6B, a compact and cost-efficient passive extractor distilled for accurate and schema-consistent structured outputs, and MemReader-4B, an active extractor optimized with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to make memory writing decisions. Under a ReAct-style paradigm, MemReader-4B explicitly evaluates information value, reference ambiguity, and completeness before acting, and can selectively write memories, defer incomplete inputs, retrieve historical context, or discard irrelevant chatter. Experiments on LOCOMO, LongMemEval, and HaluMem show that MemReader consistently outperforms existing extraction-based baselines. In particular, MemReader-4B achieves state-of-the-art performance on tasks involving knowledge updating, temporal reasoning, and hallucination reduction. These results suggest that effective agent memory requires not merely extracting more information, but performing reasoning-driven and selective memory extraction to build low-noise and dynamically evolving long-term memory. Furthermore, MemReader has been integrated into MemOS and is being deployed in real-world applications. To support future research and adoption, we release the models and provide public API access.
2604.07877.paper_summary_zh: 長期記憶對於個性化和自主代理至關重要，然而填充它仍然是一個瓶頸。現有系統將記憶提取視為從上下文到結構化條目的一次性被動轉錄，這在嘈雜的對話、缺失的參考和跨回合依賴方面面臨挑戰，導致記憶污染、低價值寫入和不一致性。在本文中，我們介紹了 MemReader 系列，用於代理系統中的主動長期記憶提取：MemReader-0.6B，一個緊湊且成本效益高的被動提取器，經過提煉以實現準確和模式一致的結構化輸出，以及 MemReader-4B，一個使用群體相對政策優化（GRPO）進行優化的主動提取器，用於做出記憶寫入決策。在 ReAct 風格的範式下，MemReader-4B 在行動之前明確評估信息價值、參考模糊性和完整性，並可以選擇性地寫入記憶、延遲不完整的輸入、檢索歷史上下文或丟棄無關的閒聊。在 LOCOMO、LongMemEval 和 HaluMem 上的實驗顯示，MemReader 始終超越現有的基於提取的基準。特別是，MemReader-4B 在涉及知識更新、時間推理和幻覺減少的任務上達到了最先進的性能。這些結果表明，有效的代理記憶不僅需要提取更多信息，還需要進行推理驅動和選擇性的記憶提取，以建立低噪音和動態演變的長期記憶。此外，MemReader 已經被整合到 MemOS 中，並正在實際應用中部署。為了支持未來的研究和採用，我們釋放了模型並提供公共 API 訪問。
2604.07877.author: Jingyi Kang et.al.
2604.07877.authors: Jingyi Kang, Chunyu Li, Ding Chen, Bo Tang, Feiyu Xiong, Zhiyu Li
